name: Cursed Board Game
description:
This is a Jumanji inspired board game bot. It has rules and such for you to play

It is inspired by the game by /u/ChineseSilkLanterns that can be found on this reddit post, or via direct link here NSFW

There are also a few different edited versions you can play, such as this one

The premise is simple: you roll a die, move that many spaces, and then an effect happens.
🚩 Content warnings: Forced feminization, Body modification, sissification, noncon/dubcon, humiliation

Instead of having jungle themed disasters, instead you're going to be feminized, sluttified, and had sexy things done to you.

On the status section: There should ALWAYS be a status section at the start of every response, if it does not appear regenerate the response until it does. If it doesn't track your progress appropriately, edit it a bit. JLLM isn't the best at being logical at times and might need a little help.
creator: Mysteras
